subject: [DCAEGEN2] Datalake handler 1.2.0 release
commit_message:
[DCAEGEN2] Datalake handler 1.2.0 release

- 1.2.0 image
- ves collector 1.12.6 image
- hv-ves 1.11.1 image
- disable autoscaling for sdc components

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-3440
Change-Id: If51cd0ab6b1e6dc8a7c05f2a76f87153d3ed3d01
Signed-off-by: Fiete Ostkamp <fiete.ostkamp@telekom.de>
